steps.title: Set up the percentage equation
steps.content:
21 is 21% of what number? translates to an equation where 21 equals 21% of the unknown number $x$:
$$21 = 0.21 \times x$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown number
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.21 to isolate $x$:
$$x = \frac{21}{0.21}$$

Rewrite $0.21 = \frac{21}{100}$:
$$x = \frac{21}{\frac{21}{100}} = 21 \times \frac{100}{21} = 100$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
